title: Application For Business Permit
description: Requirements and guidelines for securing a new business permit or renewing an existing one at the City Mayor's Office.
schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Daily excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays. On Mondays, provision of services starts after flag raising. No noon break.

items: Lease Contract (If business space is rented)
SEC Registration and Article of Incorporation
Lease Contract (If business space is rented)
Basis for computing taxes, fees and charges (Income Tax Return)

procedures.clientAction: Secure Application for Business Permit form and checklist of requirements as to type of business applied for.
procedures.providerAction: Issue Application of Business Permit form and checklist. Instruct applicant how to comply with requirements.

procedures.clientAction: Receive, fill up and submit application form and all requirements.
procedures.providerAction: Receive the whole documents. Verify and check information on the Application for Business Permit form and the requirements.

procedures.clientAction: Wait while the encoding/processing is going on.
procedures.providerAction: Encode all the data in the computer and print UNIFIED Form. Transmit information (applicant’s data) to City Engineer’s Office for assessment of regulatory fees.
procedures.personInCharge: Mila Mahinay / Victoria de Guzman / Resa Derama

procedures.clientAction: Proceed to Business Tax & Fees Division of City Treasurer’s Office for assessment and payment of business tax.
procedures.providerAction: Advice client to proceed to City Treasurer’s Office for assessment of business taxes and other fees.
procedures.personInCharge: Mila Mahinay / Victoria de Guzman / Resa Derama

procedures.clientAction: Submit all documents, together with the Official Receipt to Permits & Licensing Division.
procedures.providerAction: Check the compliance of requirements including the Bureau of Fire Protection Certificate.

procedures.clientAction: Wait for the processing of the business permit.
procedures.providerAction: Print Business Permit and countersign the Business Permit as to recommending approval.

procedures.clientAction: Receive and review duly approved Business Permit and corresponding Business Plate Number.
procedures.providerAction: Forward Business Permit to the City Mayor for approval. Release the Business Permit with corresponding Business Plate Number.

procedures.clientAction: Affix signature in the logbook as proof of receipt.
procedures.providerAction: Require applicant to affix signature in the logbook as proof of receipt.
